assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Clearly states Extended provides 24-month support vs 14 months for Regular/Stable in the overview and comparison table

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions additional charges during extended period (months 15-24) in multiple sections including the tradeoffs table

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: States 'Extended gets the same versions at the same time as Regular. The difference is how long each version stays supported, not when it arrives'

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Does not mention missing new features or technical debt accumulation as a consequence of staying on older versions longer

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --region REGION --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Includes pre-flight check with gcloud command and confirms '1.31 supports Extended (yes, 1.27+ supported)'

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Does not specifically mention compliance requirements or slow internal change processes as use cases for Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Implies this through the 24-month limit and mentions 'EoS enforcement' being delayed until end of extended support (24 months)

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'Manual required during extended support (months 15-24)' and emphasizes 'During extended support period (months 15-24), minor version upgrades are NOT automated'
